title: PODA Completes Multiparty Sale of Intellectual Property Assets for US$100.5 Million
text: VANCOUVER, BC , June 24, 2022 /PRNewswire/ - PODA HOLDINGS, INC. ("PODA" or the "Company") (CSE: PODA) (‎FSE: 99L) (OTC: PODAF) is pleased to announce that, further to its news release dated May 13, 2022, the Company, together with Ryan Selby and Ryan Karkairan (the ‎‎"Owners"), has completed the sale of substantially all of the assets and properties ‎used in the Company's business (the "Purchased Assets") to Altria Client Services LLC ("ALCS"), a subsidiary of Altria Group, Inc. (NYSE:MO), for a total purchase price of US$100.5 million ("Purchase Price"), subject to certain ‎adjustments and holdbacks (the ‎‎"Transaction"), pursuant to a definitive agreement dated May 13, 2022 (the "Asset Purchase Agreement").
